_description: Hardcoded specialist directory for hackathon demo. In production, this queries a live directory service (NHS Spine, commercial directory API).
_note: These are fictional but realistic specialist profiles for the demo.

nephrology.name: Dr Anita Patel
nephrology.clinical_focus: CKD progression, medication optimisation, diabetic nephropathy
nephrology.notes: Strong match for CKD + diabetes + medication review cases

nephrology.name: Dr Marcus Williams
nephrology.clinical_focus: General nephrology, acute kidney injury, dialysis access
nephrology.notes: Fastest availability; broader nephrology but less CKD-medication subspecialty focus

nephrology.name: Dr Fatima Okonkwo
nephrology.clinical_focus: CKD in diabetes, transplant medicine, proteinuric kidney disease
nephrology.notes: Strong diabetes-CKD subfocus matches patient profile; longest wait; non-urgent only

rheumatology.name: Dr S Patel
rheumatology.clinical_focus: Inflammatory arthritis, biologic therapy, RA management
